message: I've been slowly building my emergency kit over time, and honestly, it's one of those things that gets easier once you know what actually makes sense to grab. There's a solid resource out there that walks you through the basics without any of the overwhelm—it's helped me figure out what we actually need versus what just takes up space. Having a plan for the stuff that matters gives me real peace of mind. What's the one item you always forget about until you really need it?
